topic: My doorbell camera records me leaving the house every night at three but I never leave
title: My Doorbell Camera Records Me Leaving the House Every Night at Three. I Never Leave. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My doorbell camera records me leaving the house every night at three in the morning. I never leave.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone showing a doorbell camera clip of a figure walking away from a front porch at night, timestamp visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Suburban house. I sleep upstairs. The camera saves each clip to my phone.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a two story suburban house at night, a small doorbell camera by the front door, dark windows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I review the clips with my coffee.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone and a coffee mug on a kitchen table, the phone showing a video thumbnail, morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First clip. The front door opens. I walk out, past the camera, into the dark.
scenes.image_prompt: doorbell camera wide angle view of a front door opening at night, a figure in a coat stepping out onto a dark porch, fisheye distortion, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a dim bedroom with a person asleep in bed, a clock reading near three, faint light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same coat. Same walk. Never looking back.
scenes.image_prompt: doorbell camera view of a coated figure walking down a dark front path away from the house, never looking back, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I bolted the door from the inside.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand sliding a deadbolt closed on a front door, dim entry light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The clip still came. The door still opened.
scenes.image_prompt: doorbell camera fisheye view of a front door opening despite a bolted lock, dark porch beyond, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He leaves at three and returns at four, carrying something different each night.
scenes.image_prompt: doorbell camera view of a figure returning up the path before dawn carrying an indistinct object, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the figure stopped at the door, turned, and waved at the camera.
scenes.image_prompt: doorbell camera fisheye view of a figure at the door turned toward the camera with one hand raised in a wave, face shadowed, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I sat by the door at three to catch him.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a person seated in a chair facing a front door in a dark entryway at night, only a silhouette, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The door opened. The clip recorded two of me standing there.
scenes.image_prompt: doorbell camera fisheye view of an open front door at night with two identical figures standing in the entry, faces shadowed, vertical 9:16 framing
